steps.title: Use two readable points on the line
steps.content: The line of best fit rises from left to right, so the slope is positive. That eliminates choices A and B. Two readable points on the line are approximately $(0,0.25)$ and $(4,2)$.

steps.title: Run the slope check
steps.content: The regression row $y_1\sim m x_1+b$ gives $m=0.4375$, which rounds to $0.44$. By hand, $m=\frac{2-0.25}{4-0}=0.4375$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The positive slope near $0.44$ matches choice C. Choice D, $2.27$, is positive but much too steep for the drawn line.
